---
title: "About Me"
---

## Background

My name is **\Dalton\** and I am currently in my **Year \1\** of the **Applied Artificial Intelligence** programme at the Singapore Institute of Technology (SIT).

Before university, I studied at **\Ngee Ann Polytechnic\**, where I developed an interest in computing and mathematics. I chose SIT because of its applied learning approach and strong industry connections.

---

## Skills

| Area | Tools & Technologies |
|------|----------------------|
| Programming | Python, R |
| Data | Pandas, dplyr, SQL |
| Reporting | Quarto, RMarkdown |
| Version Control | Git, GitHub |
| Web | HTML, CSS |

---

## Interests

- 🤖 Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
- 📊 Data Visualisation and Storytelling
- 📷 Photography
- 🎵 Music

---

## Education

**Singapore Institute of Technology**
Bachelor of Science (Applied Artificial Intelligence)
*Expected Graduation: \[2028\]*

---

## Contact

Feel free to connect with me:

- **GitHub**: [github.com/duruton](https://github.com/duruton)
- **Email**: 2504003@sit.singaporetech.edu.sg
